description: A reusable type of seminary Event (e.g. Convocation, Chapel, Thesis Defense, Exit Interview). Graduation Requirement Items of type 'Event Attendance' and Culminating Project defense milestones point at a category; actual Event instances are created from it on the right date with the right participants.

fields.description: If checked, each student attends individually (e.g. a thesis defense, exit interview) and one Event is created per student. If unchecked, a single Event occurrence satisfies the whole cohort enrolled at the time (e.g. a convocation).
fields.label: Per Student

fields.description: Maps to the created Event's type. Public events are visible on the shared calendar.
fields.label: Visibility

fields.description: Instructions copied into the description of each Event created from this category (e.g. what to bring, dress code, location notes).
fields.label: Instructions

name: Event Custom Category
